properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the midst of the trails, I'm covered by Your blood You surround me with Your glorious grace, In the depths of my despair, Your hands reaches out to me, So I raise my hands and sing of Your praise.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In my weakness You are strong, So I sing to You alone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Stronger, You make me stronger Not afraid to fight! I know, You are for me, And You are with me Jesus, I am lifting You higher, Greater like no other, You are with me, Forever! (Oh… oh. . oh)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the challenge that I face, You always guide me through, I have a future and my hope is in You.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In Your presence I belong, You've refine me through the storm, In my weakness You are strong So I sing to You alone!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Stronger, You make me Stronger Not afraid to fight! I know, You are for me, And You are with me Jesus, I am lifting You higher Greater like no other, You are with me, Forever (Oh… oh. . oh.)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I am a fighter, More than a conqueror, Your spirit's within me, Jesus You set me free, You're fighting for us, Nothing can stand against us, You're strength is in me, You are my victory.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Stronger, You make me Stronger Not afraid to fight! I know, You are for me, And You are with me Jesus, I am lifting You higher, Greater like no other, And You are with me, Forever (Oh… oh. . oh.)
